claude.text: {"skill":{"skillId":"add-workout-to-weekly-mileage","displayName":"Add Workout Distance to Weekly Mileage","inputs":[{"name":"workoutId","valueType":"text","source":"slot","required":true}],"reads":["workout","weekly_running_mileage"],"writes":["weekly_running_mileage"],"steps":{"main":[{"step":"read_one","type":"workout","id":"{{workoutId}}","into":"currentWorkout"},{"step":"compute","expr":"today()","into":"currentDate"},{"step":"compute","expr":"format_date(add_days(currentDate, -(today() % 7)), 'YYYY-MM-DD')","into":"weekStart"},{"step":"read_many","type":"weekly_running_mileage","filter":"weekStart == {{weekStart}}","into":"existingWeekRecords"},{"step":"compute","expr":"count(existingWeekRecords)","into":"recordCount"},{"step":"branch","if":"recordCount > 0","then":[{"step":"set","var":"existingRecord","value":"{{existingWeekRecords[0]}}"},{"step":"compute","expr":"existingRecord.totalDistance + currentWorkout.distance","into":"newTotal"},{"step":"write_record","type":"weekly_running_mileage","id":"{{existingRecord.id}}","set":{"totalDistance":"{{newTotal}}"}}],"else":[{"step":"write_record","type":"weekly_running_mileage","set":{"weekStart":"{{weekStart}}","totalDistance":"{{currentWorkout.distance}}"}}]}]}},"type":{"typeId":"weekly_running_mileage","displayName":"Weekly Running Mileage","displayNamePlural":"Weekly Running Mileages","description":"Tracks total running distance accumulated for each calendar week","examplePhrases":["my weekly mileage","running total this week","how far did I run this week"],"attributes":[{"name":"weekStart","label":"Week Start Date","valueType":"date","required":true},{"name":"totalDistance","label":"Total Distance (km)","valueType":"decimal","required":true}],"relations":[],"presentation":{"archetype":"metric","primaryField":"totalDistance"}},"safetyAssessment":{"level":"safe","concerns":[],"userMessage":"I've created a skill that automatically adds your workout distance to a weekly running mileage tracker whenever you log a workout."}}
